title: oreocharis blepharophylla
intro: Oreocharis blepharophylla, also known as the eye-leaved Oreocharis, is a plant species belonging to the family Gesneriaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in China and Southeast Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Oreocharis blepharophylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine preparations.
